Change 1: Replace:
  # Genre – ensure natural phrasing and avoid duplicate “music”
          if p == "genre":
              genre_text = o.lower()
              if not genre_text.endswith(" music"):
                  genre_text = f"{genre_text} music"
              return f"{s} performs {genre_text}"
          # Instrument
          if p == "instrument":
              return f"{s} plays the {o}"
with:
  # Genre – phrase naturally for persons and entities
          if p == "genre":
              # Use a neutral phrasing that works for both people and genres
              # e.g., "The musical genre of Aaron Deer is Indie rock"
              # Preserve original capitalization of the object
              return f"The musical genre of {s} is {o}"
          # Instrument – handle cases where the subject is a genre (e.g., "Country music")
          if p == "instrument":
              # If the subject denotes a musical style (ends with "music"), describe the instrument...
              if s.strip().lower().endswith("music"):
                  return f"The {o} is an instrument associated with {s.lower()}"
              else:
                  return f"{s} plays the {o}"
